bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid. The opponent’s opening offer gives me low utility and shows no concession pattern yet, so I will counter with my strongest values across all issues.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid while making only a minimal concession to avoid simply repeating my prior offer. The opponent has repeated the same all-valueE offer, which is very low utility for me and shows no concession yet, so I should hold firm on my high-weight issues A, B, and C while offering flexibility on low-weight issueE.

At t=0.04 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only a small concession on a low-weight issue. The opponent has repeated an almost all-valueE bid and their latest offer is not improving my utility, so there is no evidence of meaningful concession yet; I will hold firm on high-weight issues A, B, and C while varying my previous bid slightly.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid and only making small concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent has repeated nearly the same low-utility offer for me and has not shown meaningful concession, so I will hold firm on my most important issues while slightly varying my prior bid to avoid repetition.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.81 because it is still very early, and the opponent’s offers remain quite poor for me with little real concession. The opponent has repeatedly pushed valueE and recently used valueD on issueD/issueA, so I am holding firm on my most important issues while making a small concession on the low-weight issueD.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.77 by holding firm on my high-importance issues A, B, and C while conceding on the lower-weight issues D and E. Since it is still early at t=0.10 and the opponent has not meaningfully improved their offers for my utility, I should not concede on core issues yet, but I can avoid repeating my last bid and test flexibility on less costly issues.

At t=0.12 it is still early, and the opponent’s offers remain very low for my utility and show little meaningful concession, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while varying from my last exact offer. I am holding firm on my most important issues A, B, and C, while making a small concession on the low-weight issueE to explore tradeoff space.

I am targeting a still-strong utility by holding firm on my highest-value issues A, B, and C, while conceding on the lower-weight issues D and E where the opponent has repeatedly proposed valueD/valueE. Since it is still early at t=0.14 and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me with little real concession, I am not ready to give up my core preferences.

I am targeting a high utility bid because it is still early (t=0.16) and the opponent’s offers have only improved slightly for me, from about 0.25 to 0.28 utility. Their behavior suggests they may care about lower-weight issues like issueD/issueE, so I concede issueD while holding firm on my high-importance issues issueA, issueB, and issueC.

I targeted a still-strong utility offer around 0.80, since it is early at t=0.18 but the opponent has held mostly firm on valueE-heavy bids. I am holding firm on my highest-weight issues A, B, and C, while conceding on lower-weight issues D and E toward values the opponent has repeatedly proposed.

I am targeting a solid early-game utility around 0.77, keeping my strongest issues issueA, issueB, and issueC at top values while conceding on the lower-weight issues issueD and issueE. The opponent has mostly held firm on valueE-heavy offers with little sign of improving utility for me, so at t=0.20 I should not make major concessions yet, but I can offer valueE on issues that matter less to me.

At t=0.22 it is still early, so I am keeping my highest-value positions on the important issues A, B, and C while offering concessions on the lower-weight issues D and E. The opponent’s bids consistently push valueE/valueD on the lower issues and have not meaningfully conceded on issueB, so I target a strong but slightly more accommodating bid rather than dropping on my core issues.

At t=0.24 I am still targeting a strong utility bid around 0.77, since it is early enough not to concede on my highest-weight issues issueA, issueB, and issueC. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and mostly hold issueB/valueE and issueE/valueE, though their latest offer concedes issueC to my best valueB, so I will reciprocate mainly on lower-weight issueD and issueE while protecting core value.

At t=0.26 I am still targeting a strong utility bid, holding firm on my high-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding mainly on lower-weight issues D and E. The opponent has mostly offered low-utility bids for me, but they have shown some movement on issueC and variability on issueD/issueE, so I am keeping issueC at my best value and offering concessions where they cost me less.

At t=0.28 I am still targeting a high-utility bid, since the opponent’s offers remain low for me despite some movement, especially their latest concession to my preferred issueC valueB. I am holding firm on high-importance issueA and issueB while conceding lower-weight issueD and issueE toward values the opponent has repeatedly proposed.

At t=0.30 I am targeting a still-strong but meaningfully more conciliatory utility around 0.70, since there is time left but the negotiation is moving into the mid-game. The opponent has repeatedly pushed issueB=valueE and low-utility values on D/E, while occasionally accepting issueC=valueB; I will hold firm on my highest-weight issueA and preferred issueC, but make a partial concession on issueB and continue conceding low-weight D/E.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.69 while making a modest concession because we are entering the early mid-game. The opponent has consistently pushed issueB toward valueE and low-utility values on issueA, but has shown some movement toward my preferred issueC: valueB, so I will hold firm on issueA and issueC while conceding on lower-weight issueD/issueE and partially on issueB.

I am targeting about 0.70 utility, keeping my high-weight priorities issueA=valueA and issueC=valueB while conceding on lower-weight issueD/issueE and already softening issueB to valueB. At t=0.34 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s very low-utility pattern; their offers show small concessions on issueC but they remain firm on issueB=valueE and generally low on issueA, with no messages to alter that assessment.

At t=0.36 I am still targeting a relatively strong utility around 0.69, since the opponent has only modestly improved offers and the deadline is not yet close. Their latest bid concedes on issueB to valueB and earlier they have shown some willingness on issueC=valueB, so I keep my high-weight issueA and issueC positions while conceding lower-weight issueD/issueE toward values they often propose.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.70 by holding firm on my most important issueA and issueC while conceding on lower-weight issueD/issueE and already moderating issueB to valueB. At t=0.38 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s very low-utility bids; their offers show only limited concession, with issueC sometimes reaching valueB and issueB once reaching valueB, so I will build around those signals.

At t=0.40 I am targeting a still-strong utility while making mid-game concessions on lower-weight issues, especially issueD and issueE. The opponent’s offers remain poor for me overall, but they have recently moved to issueB:valueB and have previously offered issueC:valueB, so I hold firm on my highest-value anchors issueA and issueC while matching some signals where affordable.

I am targeting a utility around 0.704, keeping my high-importance issueA at valueA and issueC at valueB while conceding on lower-weight issueD and issueE to valueE. At t=0.42 there is some mid-game pressure to make the bid more acceptable, and the opponent’s latest offer shows movement on issueA but still strongly favors valueE on several issues. There are no opponent messages to weigh, so I am relying on the offer pattern only.

At t=0.44 I am still aiming for a strong mid-game utility around 0.73 rather than making a large concession. The opponent’s latest offer finally accepted my best issueC value and used issueD:valueC, so I keep my high-weight issueA and issueC positions while conceding on lower/medium areas with issueB:valueB and issueE:valueE; there are no opponent messages to weigh.

I am targeting a still-solid midgame utility around 0.69, conceding mainly on lower-weight issues while holding firm on high-value issueA and issueC. The opponent has repeatedly signaled interest in issueD/valueD or valueE and issueE/valueE, and has recently offered issueB/valueB, so I am matching some of those signals without dropping my core demands too far at t=0.46.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.67, conceding mainly on lower-weight issues while still protecting my highest-value issues issueA and issueC. The opponent has shown some willingness to move on issueB and issueC, but continues pushing hard on issueA/issueE; with no messages to consider, I rely on the offer pattern and make a moderate concession from my prior bid.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.65: still preserving my most important issueA and strong issueC value, while conceding on lower/medium issues to improve acceptability. The opponent’s offers remain low for me, but they have recently shown movement on issueB to valueD and have previously offered issueC valueB, so I am incorporating those signals without over-conceding at t=0.50.
